message:
feat(extensions-js): add CJS/ESM compat stub for @mariozechner/clipboard

Adds a synthetic module stub for the @mariozechner/clipboard package to
the QuickJS built-in module registry. This package is imported by at
least one official pi-mono extension (the clipboard extension by the
pi-mono author) and provides async getText()/setText() clipboard access.

Since the QuickJS runtime runs headless without access to system
clipboard APIs, the stub provides no-op implementations:
  - getText() → returns empty string
  - setText(_text) → silently discards

This follows the same pattern used for other native-dependency stubs
like node-pty, chokidar, and tree-sitter — allowing extensions that
import the package to load and register their tools/commands without
crashing on missing module resolution, even though clipboard
functionality is not available in the agent runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
